name: Turtle Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust ingredients. Press into pie plate. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
2. Cool. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water. Let stand 1 minute.
3. Put mixture in saucepan, stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Add 1 cup of cream and bring to boil.
5. Put chocolate chips into food processor. Pour milk mixture into processor and blend until chocolate is melted.
6. Add 1/2 cup cream, eggs, and vanilla. Chill until thick.
7. In bowl mix unwrapped caramels and 1/4 cup cream. Heat in microwave until melted. Stir to froth.
8. Pour into crust. Cool.
9. Add chocolate mixture on top and chill.
10. Top with whipped cream.
